content: Parent range Santa Ana Mountains Topo map USGS Alberhill Climbing Easiest route Hike Los Pinos Peak is a 4,455-foot 1,358 m summit in the Santa Ana Mountains in Orange County , California , about 8 miles 13 km east of Rancho Santa Margarita
